rule_metadata.author: Thomas Patzke
rule_metadata.title: WMI Persistence - Script Event Consumer File Write

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Persistence - Script Event Consumer File Write
id: 33f41cdd-35ac-4ba8-814b-c6a4244a1ad4
status: test
description: Detects file writes of WMI script event consumer
references:
- https://www.eideon.com/2018-03-02-THL03-WMIBackdoors/
author: Thomas Patzke
date: 2018-03-07
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1546.003
- attack.persistence
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image: C:\WINDOWS\system32\wbem\scrcons.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Dell Power Manager (C:\Program Files\Dell\PowerManager\DpmPowerPlanSetup.exe)
level: high
